intentSynonyms: get an author feed in bsky
look up an author feed in bsky
fetch a single author feed in bsky
view one specific author feed in bsky
get posts by a specific user in bsky
description: Get posts by a specific user. Filter by post type: posts_with_replies (default), posts_no_replies, posts_with_media, or posts_and_author_threads.

actor.description: DID or handle of the user (e.g., "user.bsky.social" or "did:plc:...")

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

limit.description: Maximum number of posts to return (default 50, max 100)
